goal: 扫描历史项目已生成的 auto-execute task，校验现有 task-auto-execute 模板覆盖度，并补强缺失或不够具体的独立模板

Map historical tasks to matching task-auto-execute templates and identify missing families.
Add and strengthen missing or too-generic independent templates.

completionCondition: Both global roots must match patched-skill-manifest.json, content audit must pass 58/58, historical coverage must show zero missing template families, and sync dry-run must report zero pending changes.
